questions.question: Agri-Entrepreneurship ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Agriculture sector mein naye business ideas shuru karna
options.C: Government jobs ke liye apply karna

questions.explanation: Agri-Entrepreneurship ka matlab hai agriculture sector mein innovation aur naye business ideas ko implement karna, jisse profit aur employment dono generate ho.

questions.question: Ek successful agri-entrepreneur mein kaunsi quality honi chahiye?

options.B: Sirf sarkari madad par nirbhar rehna

questions.explanation: Ek successful agri-entrepreneur mein risk lene ki kshamta, innovation, aur problem-solving skills honi chahiye.

questions.question: India mein agri-entrepreneurship ko promote karne ka ek main reason kya hai?

options.B: Rural employment badhana aur farmers ki income increase karna

questions.explanation: Agri-entrepreneurship rural employment badhane aur farmers ki income increase karne mein madad karta hai, jisse rural economy strong hoti hai.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship ke liye kaunsa sector sabse zyada promising hai?

options.B: Manufacturing sector

questions.explanation: Agri-entrepreneurship ka focus agriculture aur usse jude sectors jaise food processing, dairy, horticulture, etc. par hota hai.

questions.question: Innovation ka agri-entrepreneurship mein kya role hai?

options.B: Naye products aur services develop karne mein madad karta hai

questions.explanation: Innovation naye products, services, aur efficient methods develop karne mein madad karta hai, jisse agri-business competitive banta hai.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship mein sabse common challenge kya hai?

options.B: Access to finance aur market linkages ki kami

questions.explanation: Agri-entrepreneurs ko aksar finance access karne aur apne products ke liye sahi market dhoondhne mein challenges aate hain.

questions.question: Value addition ka agri-entrepreneurship mein kya matlab hai?

options.A: Crop ko bina change kiye bechna
options.B: Raw agricultural produce ko process karke uski value badhana

questions.explanation: Value addition ka matlab hai raw produce ko process karke usme extra features ya form add karna (jaise juice banana, jam banana) jisse uski market value badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek agri-entrepreneur ke liye market research kyun important hai?

options.B: Customers ki needs aur market trends ko samajhne ke liye
options.C: Sirf government data collect karne ke liye
options.D: Products ki quality kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Market research customers ki needs, competitors, aur market trends ko samajhne mein madad karta hai, jisse sahi business decisions liye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship mein 'diversification' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Alag-alag crops, livestock ya related activities mein invest karna

questions.explanation: Diversification ka matlab hai risk ko kam karne aur income sources badhane ke liye alag-alag crops, livestock ya related activities mein invest karna.

questions.question: Sustainability agri-entrepreneurship ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Kyuki yeh ek naya trend hai
options.B: Long-term profitability aur environmental protection ke liye
options.D: Government ko khush karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sustainability long-term profitability maintain karne aur environment ko protect karte hue resources ka efficient use karne ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Digital marketing agri-entrepreneurs ke liye kaise helpful ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf bade shehron mein kaam karta hai
options.B: Products ko bade audience tak pahunchane mein madad karta hai

questions.explanation: Digital marketing (social media, e-commerce) agri-products ko bade audience tak pahunchane aur sales badhane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Agritech startups ka agri-entrepreneurship mein kya role hai?

options.B: Technology ka use karke agriculture ko efficient banana

questions.explanation: Agritech startups technology (drones, AI, sensors) ka use karke agriculture processes ko efficient aur productive banate hain.

questions.question: Ek agri-entrepreneur ko apne product ki quality par kyun focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Customer trust aur brand reputation banane ke liye
options.D: Competitive market se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: High quality products customer trust banate hain, repeat business late hain aur brand reputation ko boost karte hain.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship mein 'supply chain' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek hi dukaan se saman kharidna
options.B: Produce ke farm se consumer tak pahunchne ka pura process

questions.explanation: Supply chain mein produce ke production, processing, storage, transport aur distribution tak ke sabhi steps shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Rural areas mein agri-entrepreneurship ka kya positive impact ho sakta hai?

options.B: Employment opportunities create karna aur income levels badhana
options.D: Sirf bade farmers ko fayda pahunchana

questions.explanation: Agri-entrepreneurship rural areas mein employment opportunities create karta hai aur logon ki income levels ko badhata hai, jisse rural development hota hai.

questions.question: FPO ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Farmer Producer Organization

questions.explanation: FPO ka full form Farmer Producer Organization hai, jisme farmers group banakar apne business activities karte hain.

questions.question: FPO banane ka primary aim kya hai?

options.B: Farmers ko collective power dena aur unki bargaining strength badhana

questions.explanation: FPO farmers ko ek saath laakar unki bargaining power badhate hain, jisse unhe behtar prices aur services mil paati hain.

questions.question: FPO mein farmers ko kaunse fayde milte hain?

options.B: Better market access, input cost mein kami, value addition opportunities

questions.explanation: FPO farmers ko collective purchasing, marketing, aur value addition ke through behtar market access aur kam input cost provide karte hain.

questions.question: Ek FPO kis legal form mein register ho sakta hai?

options.B: Partnership Firm

questions.explanation: FPOs India mein mainly Producer Company (under Companies Act, 2013) ya Cooperative Society (under Cooperative Societies Act) ke roop mein register hote hain.

questions.question: NABARD ka FPO promotion mein kya role hai?

options.A: NABARD FPO ko regulate karta hai
options.B: Financial assistance aur capacity building support provide karta hai
options.C: FPO ko banne se rokta hai

questions.explanation: NABARD FPOs ko financial support, training, aur capacity building services provide karke unke formation aur strengthening mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: SFAC ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Small Farmers Agri-Consortium

questions.explanation: SFAC ka full form Small Farmers Agri-Business Consortium hai, jo FPOs ko support aur guidance provide karta hai.

questions.question: FPO mein share capital kaun contribute karta hai?

options.B: Sirf banks

questions.explanation: FPO ke member farmers hi uske share capital mein contribute karte hain, jisse unki ownership aur participation badhti hai.

questions.question: FPO ki governance structure kaisi hoti hai?

options.B: Democratic hoti hai, jahan members vote karte hain
options.D: Private company ki tarah hoti hai

questions.explanation: FPO ki governance democratic hoti hai, jahan members General Body meetings mein vote karte hain aur Board of Directors ko chunte hain.

questions.question: FPO dwara ki jaane wali ek common activity kya hai?

options.B: Collective procurement of inputs (seeds, fertilizers)

questions.explanation: FPOs apne members ke liye collective input procurement karte hain, jisse unhe bulk discount milta hai aur cost kam hoti hai.

questions.question: FPO mein value addition activities ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Farmers ko apne produce ka behtar price milta hai

questions.explanation: Value addition (grading, sorting, processing) se farmers ko apne produce ka behtar price milta hai aur unki income badhti hai.

questions.question: FPO ke samne aane wala ek major challenge kya hai?

options.B: Lack of professional management aur market linkages

questions.explanation: FPOs ko aksar professional management ki kami aur reliable market linkages establish karne mein challenges aate hain.

questions.question: FPO ke through farmers apni produce ko kaise bech sakte hain?

options.B: Directly to consumers, retailers, ya processors

questions.explanation: FPOs farmers ko collective marketing ke through seedhe consumers, retailers ya processors tak pahunchne mein madad karte hain, jisse middleman kam hote hain.

questions.question: FPO mein 'pooling of produce' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Har farmer apni produce alag beche
options.B: Sab farmers apni produce ek saath ikatthi karke beche

questions.explanation: Pooling of produce ka matlab hai sabhi member farmers apni produce ko ek saath ikattha karte hain, jisse bulk quantity mein marketing karna asaan ho jaata hai.

questions.question: FPO ke liye 'business plan' kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Apne goals, strategies aur financial projections ko define karne ke liye
options.C: Loan lene se bachne ke liye
options.D: Farmers ko confuse karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek business plan FPO ke future direction, operational strategies aur financial viability ko clearly define karta hai.

questions.question: FPO mein 'equity grant' kaun provide karta hai?

options.B: Government schemes jaise SFAC

questions.explanation: SFAC jaisi government agencies FPOs ko equity grant provide karti hain, jisse unki financial stability badhti hai aur member farmers ka share capital boost hota hai.

questions.question: FPO ke Board of Directors mein kaun hote hain?

options.B: Member farmers dwara chune gaye representatives

questions.explanation: FPO ke Board of Directors mein member farmers dwara chune gaye representatives hote hain, jo FPO ke daily operations aur strategic decisions ko manage karte hain.

questions.question: FPO ke liye 'capacity building' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Members aur management ko training aur skill development provide karna

questions.explanation: Capacity building mein members aur management ko business management, marketing, financial literacy, aur technical skills ki training dena shamil hai.

questions.question: FPO ki success ke liye kaunsa factor sabse important hai?

options.B: Strong leadership aur member participation

questions.explanation: Strong leadership, active member participation, aur transparent management FPO ki long-term success ke liye critical hain.

questions.question: FPO ke through farmers ko kaunsi services mil sakti hain?

options.B: Credit, insurance, technical advice, storage facilities

questions.explanation: FPOs apne members ko credit access, crop insurance, technical guidance, aur storage jaise value-added services provide kar sakte hain.

questions.question: FPO formation mein 'mobilization' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Farmers ko ek saath laana aur FPO ke faydon ke baare mein awareness failana

questions.explanation: Mobilization ka matlab hai farmers ko motivate karke FPO mein shamil karna aur unhe FPO ke goals aur benefits ke baare mein jaankari dena.

questions.question: Business plan ka sabse important section kaunsa hai?

options.B: Executive Summary

questions.explanation: Executive Summary business plan ka sabse important section hota hai, jo poore plan ka brief overview deta hai aur investors ka interest generate karta hai.

questions.question: SWOT analysis mein 'S' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Strategy

questions.explanation: SWOT analysis mein S = Strengths, W = Weaknesses, O = Opportunities, T = Threats. Strengths business ke internal positive attributes hote hain.

questions.question: Ek agri-business plan mein 'market analysis' section mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Target customers, market size, competition

questions.explanation: Market analysis mein target market, customer demographics, market size, aur competitors ki detailed study shamil hoti hai.

questions.question: Business plan ka 'financial plan' section kya cover karta hai?

options.B: Revenue projections, cost analysis, funding requirements

questions.explanation: Financial plan mein business ke expected revenues, operational costs, profit margins, aur funding needs ka detailed breakdown hota hai.

questions.question: Risk management agri-business ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Unexpected losses se bachne aur business ko stable rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Risk management business ko potential threats (jaise crop failure, market price fluctuations) se bachata hai aur financial stability maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Ek effective business plan ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Business ke liye roadmap provide karna aur investors ko attract karna

questions.explanation: Business plan business ke goals, strategies aur operations ka clear roadmap deta hai, aur potential investors ko convince karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-business mein 'operational plan' kya describe karta hai?

options.B: Daily operations, production process, supply chain management

questions.explanation: Operational plan batata hai ki business kaise chalega, production kaise hoga, supplies kaise manage hongi, aur services kaise deliver hongi.

questions.question: SWOT analysis mein 'Threats' kya hote hain?

options.B: External negative factors jo business ko harm kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Threats external factors hote hain jaise competition, changing regulations, natural calamities jo business ke liye challenges create kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneur ke liye 'budgeting' kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Funds ko efficient tareeke se manage karne aur financial goals achieve karne ke liye
options.C: Loan lene se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Budgeting funds ko plan aur control karne mein madad karta hai, jisse expenses manage hote hain aur financial goals achieve ho paate hain.

questions.question: Team management ka agri-business mein kya importance hai?

options.B: Productivity badhana, employee satisfaction maintain karna, aur goals achieve karna

questions.explanation: Effective team management productivity badhata hai, team members ko motivate karta hai, aur overall business goals ko achieve karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-business mein 'inventory management' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Raw materials, finished goods, aur supplies ko efficient tareeke se track aur control karna

questions.explanation: Inventory management mein raw materials, produce, aur supplies ki proper tracking, storage, aur timely availability ensure karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Business plan mein 'Executive Summary' kab likha jaana chahiye?

options.B: Sabse aakhir mein, poora plan banane ke baad

questions.explanation: Executive Summary ko poora business plan banane ke baad likhna chahiye, taki yeh poore plan ka concise aur accurate overview de sake.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneur ke liye 'legal compliance' kyun important hai?

options.B: Penalties se bachne aur business ki credibility maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Market share kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Legal compliance (registration, licenses, permits) business ko penalties se bachata hai aur uski credibility aur trust ko maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Business plan mein 'Marketing Strategy' section kya batata hai?

options.B: Products ko customers tak kaise pahunchaya jayega aur becha jayega

questions.explanation: Marketing strategy mein pricing, promotion, distribution channels, aur sales tactics shamil hote hain jo products ko target customers tak pahunchane mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Ek good business plan mein 'realistic goals' kyun hone chahiye?

options.A: Kyuki bade goals boring hote hain
options.B: Taki goals achievable hon aur business track par rahe
options.C: Sirf investors ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Realistic goals business ko achievable targets dete hain, jisse progress track karna asaan hota hai aur resources ka sahi use hota hai.

questions.question: Agriculture mein marketing ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Farmers ko apne produce ka sahi price dilana aur demand create karna

questions.explanation: Agriculture marketing ka goal farmers ko apne produce ka fair price dilana, market access badhana aur consumer demand create karna hai.

questions.question: Value addition ka ek simple example kya hai?

options.B: Tomatoes se tomato sauce ya ketchup banana

questions.explanation: Raw produce ko process karke naya product banana (jaise tomatoes se sauce) value addition ka ek classic example hai.

questions.question: Branding agri-products ke liye kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf products ko mehnga karne ke liye
options.B: Products ko market mein alag pehchan dene aur customer loyalty banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Branding products ko ek unique identity deta hai, customers ka trust banata hai aur unhe competitors se alag dikhata hai.

questions.question: Direct marketing channel ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Produce ko middlemen ke through bechna
options.B: Farmers dwara seedhe consumers ko produce bechna

questions.explanation: Direct marketing mein farmers apne produce ko seedhe consumers ko bechte hain, jaise farmers' markets, farm-gate sales, ya online platforms.

questions.question: Packaging agri-products ke liye kaunse fayde provide karta hai?

options.B: Product ko protect karta hai, shelf life badhata hai, aur information provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Packaging product ko damage se bachata hai, uski shelf life badhata hai, aur nutritional information jaise details provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-products mein grading aur standardization kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf products ko discard karne ke liye
options.B: Quality maintain karne, fair price dilane aur marketability badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Grading aur standardization products ki quality ko define karte hain, jisse buyers ko trust hota hai aur farmers ko fair price milta hai.

questions.question: E-commerce platform agri-entrepreneurs ke liye kaise helpful hain?

options.B: Products ko bade geographical area mein bechne mein madad karte hain

questions.explanation: E-commerce platforms agri-entrepreneurs ko national aur international markets tak pahunchne mein madad karte hain, jisse sales potential badhta hai.

questions.question: Value addition se farmers ki income kaise badhti hai?

options.B: Processed products ki high market value hoti hai

questions.explanation: Value added products ki market mein raw produce se zyada price hoti hai, jisse farmers ko behtar returns milte hain.

questions.question: Market information ka agri-entrepreneur ke liye kya importance hai?

options.B: Sahi planting decisions, pricing strategies, aur sales planning ke liye
options.C: Sirf government ko report karne ke liye
options.D: Competitors ko copy karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Market information (prices, demand, supply) farmers ko informed decisions lene mein madad karti hai, jisse profitability badhti hai.

questions.question: Agri-marketing mein 'cold chain' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Perishable products ki shelf life badhane ke liye temperature control karna

questions.explanation: Cold chain (refrigerated storage aur transport) perishable agri-products ko kharab hone se bachata hai aur unki shelf life badhata hai.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurs ke liye 'export potential' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apne products ko international markets mein bechne ki kshamta

questions.explanation: Export potential ka matlab hai apne high-quality agri-products ko international markets mein bechkar global customers tak pahunchna.

questions.question: Agri-marketing mein 'contract farming' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Farmers ko assured market aur price milta hai
options.C: Sirf bade farmers ko fayda hota hai

questions.explanation: Contract farming mein farmers aur buyers ke beech ek agreement hota hai, jisse farmers ko assured market aur price milta hai, aur buyers ko guaranteed supply.

questions.question: Agri-products ke liye 'online presence' banana kyun faydemand hai?

options.B: Wide customer reach, low marketing cost, aur direct selling opportunities
options.D: Products ki quality kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Online presence se agri-entrepreneurs kam cost mein bade customer base tak pahunch sakte hain aur seedhe products bech sakte hain.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurs ke liye 'food safety standards' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Consumer trust maintain karne aur legal compliance ensure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Food safety standards ko follow karna consumer health ke liye essential hai aur business ki reputation aur legal compliance ke liye bhi important hai.

questions.question: Agri-marketing mein 'cooperative marketing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek farmer marketing karta hai
options.B: Farmers group banakar collective marketing karte hain

questions.explanation: Cooperative marketing mein farmers ek saath milkar apne produce ko market karte hain, jisse unki bargaining power badhti hai aur costs kam hoti hain.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneur ke liye 'working capital' kya hota hai?

options.B: Daily operations ke liye required funds (raw materials, salaries)

questions.explanation: Working capital woh funds hote hain jo business ke day-to-day operations jaise raw material kharidne, salaries dene, aur bills pay karne ke liye chahiye hote hain.

questions.question: Agri-businesses ke liye 'loan' lene ka ek common source kya hai?

options.B: Commercial Banks aur Cooperative Banks

questions.explanation: Commercial banks, cooperative banks, aur regional rural banks agri-businesses ko loans provide karte hain.

questions.question: PM-KISAN scheme ka primary objective kya hai?

options.B: Eligible landholding farmer families ko income support provide karna

questions.explanation: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi) scheme farmers ko direct income support provide karti hai.

questions.question: Agri Infra Fund (AIF) ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Post-harvest management infrastructure aur community farming assets ke liye financial support

questions.explanation: AIF long-term debt financing facility hai jo post-harvest management infrastructure aur community farming assets ke liye provide ki jaati hai.

questions.question: MUDRA Yojana kisko loan provide karti hai?

options.B: Small aur micro-enterprises ko non-corporate, non-farm sector mein

questions.explanation: MUDRA (Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency) Yojana small aur micro-enterprises ko financial assistance provide karti hai, jisme agri-allied activities bhi shamil hain.

questions.question: Crop insurance ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Crop ko nuksaan se bachata hai
options.B: Crop failure ke case mein farmers ko financial protection provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Crop insurance (jaise PMFBY) farmers ko natural calamities aur pests se hone wale crop losses ke against financial security provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-business mein 'revenue' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Sales se generate hua total income

questions.explanation: Revenue woh total income hoti hai jo business apne goods ya services ki sales se generate karta hai.

questions.question: 'Cost of production' mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Seeds, fertilizers, labour, electricity, machinery depreciation

questions.explanation: Cost of production mein direct aur indirect expenses shamil hote hain jo produce banane mein lagte hain, jaise inputs, labour, utilities.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneur ke liye 'financial literacy' kyun important hai?

options.B: Better financial decisions lene, funds manage karne aur profitability badhane ke liye
options.C: Sirf banks ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Financial literacy entrepreneurs ko apne finances ko effectively manage karne, budgeting karne, aur investment decisions lene mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) scheme ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf ATM card provide karta hai
options.B: Farmers ko short-term credit provide karta hai for crop production

questions.explanation: KCC farmers ko crop production aur other allied activities ke liye flexible aur low-interest short-term credit provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-business mein 'profit' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Revenue minus expenses

questions.explanation: Profit woh amount hota hai jo total revenue mein se total expenses ko minus karne ke baad bachta hai.

questions.question: Venture capital agri-startups ke liye kaise helpful ho sakta hai?

options.B: High-growth potential startups ko equity funding provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Venture capital firms high-growth potential agri-startups mein equity investment karti hain, jiske badle mein ownership stake leti hain.

questions.question: Subsidy ka agri-entrepreneurs par kya impact hota hai?

options.B: Production cost kam karti hai aur accessibility badhati hai

questions.explanation: Subsidies (jaise fertilizers, machinery par) entrepreneurs ke liye production cost kam karti hain aur essential inputs ki accessibility badhati hain.

questions.question: Agri-business ke liye 'balance sheet' kya show karti hai?

options.B: Assets, liabilities, aur owner's equity at a specific point in time

questions.explanation: Balance sheet business ki financial position ko depict karti hai, jisme uske assets, liabilities, aur owner's equity shamil hote hain.

questions.question: NABARD ki kaunsi scheme FPO ko financial support deti hai?

options.B: FPO Promotion & Nurturing Scheme

questions.explanation: NABARD FPOs ko promote aur nurture karne ke liye alag-alag schemes aur financial assistance provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneur ke liye 'cash flow management' kyun important hai?

options.B: Liquidity maintain karne aur bills timely pay karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective cash flow management business ko sufficient cash maintain karne mein madad karta hai, jisse bills timely pay ho paate hain aur operations smooth chalte hain.

questions.question: Agricultural term loan kisliye liya jaata hai?

options.B: Long-term investments jaise machinery, land, irrigation projects

questions.explanation: Agricultural term loans long-term investments jaise machinery kharidne, irrigation system lagane, ya farm infrastructure develop karne ke liye hote hain.

questions.question: Government schemes agri-entrepreneurs ko kaise support karti hain?

options.B: Financial assistance, subsidies, training aur market linkages provide karke

questions.explanation: Government schemes financial support, subsidies, technical guidance, training, aur market access provide karke agri-entrepreneurs ko empower karti hain.

questions.question: Agri-business mein 'depreciation' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Asset ki value mein samay ke saath hone wali kami

questions.explanation: Depreciation accounting term hai jo asset (jaise machinery) ki value mein wear and tear ya obsolescence ke karan hone wali kami ko refer karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-businesses ke liye 'debt-equity ratio' kyun important hai?

options.B: Business ki financial leverage aur risk ko assess karne ke liye
options.C: Marketing strategy decide karne ke liye
options.D: Product quality check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Debt-equity ratio business ki financial health ko batata hai, ki kitna capital debt se aur kitna equity se finance kiya gaya hai, jo risk assessment mein helpful hai.

questions.question: MSME registration agri-entrepreneurs ke liye kyun faydemand hai?

options.B: Government schemes, tax benefits, aur priority sector lending ka fayda uthane ke liye

questions.explanation: MSME (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises) registration businesses ko various government schemes, subsidies, tax benefits, aur easier credit access provide karta hai.

questions.question: FSSAI license kisliye required hota hai?

options.B: Food-related businesses ke liye, food safety aur quality ensure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) license food processing, manufacturing, distribution aur sales karne wale businesses ke liye mandatory hai.

questions.question: GST registration ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Goods and Services Tax ke under register hona
options.C: Government job ke liye apply karna

questions.explanation: GST (Goods and Services Tax) registration businesses ke liye mandatory hai agar unka annual turnover ek certain limit se zyada ho, taaki tax compliance ho sake.

questions.question: Intellectual Property Rights (IPR) agriculture mein kya cover karte hain?

options.B: Plant varieties, trademarks for agri-products, geographical indications

questions.explanation: IPR agriculture mein naye plant varieties (PPV&FR Act), agri-product brands (trademarks), aur region-specific products (GI) ko protect karte hain.

questions.question: Contract farming mein 'agreement' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Buyer aur farmer ke rights aur responsibilities ko define karna

questions.explanation: Contract farming agreement buyer aur farmer ke beech terms aur conditions ko legally bind karta hai, jisse disputes minimize hote hain.

questions.question: Environmental regulations agri-businesses ke liye kyun zaroori hain?

options.B: Pollution control, resource conservation, aur sustainable practices ensure karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf government ko report karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Environmental regulations business ko environment friendly practices follow karne, pollution kam karne, aur natural resources ko protect karne ke liye guide karte hain.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship mein 'success story' se kya seekh milti hai?

options.B: Challenges ko overcome karne ke liye motivation aur practical strategies
options.D: Sirf bade investors par depend karna

questions.explanation: Success stories entrepreneurs ko motivate karti hain aur unhe real-world challenges ko tackle karne ke liye practical insights aur strategies provide karti hain.

questions.question: Registrar of Companies (RoC) mein registration kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Company (jaise Producer Company) form karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Producer Company jaise legal entities ko Companies Act ke under RoC mein register karna mandatory hota hai.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship mein 'ethical practices' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Customer trust, brand reputation aur long-term sustainability ke liye
options.C: Sirf profit kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ethical practices (fair dealing, transparency, social responsibility) customer trust banate hain, brand reputation ko boost karte hain, aur business ki long-term sustainability ensure karte hain.

questions.question: Future mein agri-entrepreneurship ka kaunsa area sabse zyada growth dikha sakta hai?

options.B: Organic farming, precision agriculture, food processing, agri-tech

questions.explanation: Organic farming, precision agriculture (drones, IoT), value-added food processing, aur agri-tech solutions future growth ke liye promising areas hain.

questions.question: Successful FPO ki ek key characteristic kya hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi member ka control
options.B: Strong member ownership aur participation

questions.explanation: Successful FPOs mein members ki strong ownership aur active participation hoti hai, jisse collective decision-making aur accountability badhti hai.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneur ke liye 'networking' kyun important hai?

options.B: Market opportunities, partnerships aur mentorship access karne ke liye
options.D: Apne business ko limit karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Networking entrepreneurs ko industry contacts banane, new opportunities explore karne, aur valuable advice lene mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship mein 'social impact' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Community development, employment generation, aur rural upliftment mein contribution

questions.explanation: Social impact ka matlab hai business dwara society par padne wale positive effects, jaise employment, improved livelihoods, aur community development.

questions.question: Agri-entrepreneurship mein 'adaptability' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Kyuki yeh ek naya trend hai
options.B: Market changes, climate variations, aur technological advancements ke saath adjust hone ke liye
options.C: Sirf problems create karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Agri-business mein fast-changing market conditions, climate change, aur naye technologies ke saath adjust hone ke liye adaptability critical hai.

questions.question: Ek agri-entrepreneur ke liye 'continuous learning' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Naye skills acquire karne, industry trends ke saath update rehne aur business ko innovate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Continuous learning entrepreneurs ko naye techniques, market trends, aur management skills seekhne mein madad karta hai, jisse business competitive aur innovative rehta hai.
